mentions.note: Commercial aircraft services; expect strong performance; data-center backup power business adds growth; stock hit could be attractive if it dips.
Commercial airline parts supplier up 27% YTD; part of great aerospace boom with no sign of slowing; Cramer has recommended for long time.

Strong earnings beat (15-cent EPS beat off $1.30 basis, sales beat, FY guidance raised); aerospace aftermarket powerhouse; parts (new/used), maintenance services, Tracks software (100+ airline customers) enabling synergistic ordering/fulfillment; defense sales +23%, balance commercial/government cycles.
